CustomField.description: Matching the LLP template sorting order with the LLP disk sheet of engine assembly. If Checked, the sorting order on the LLP template is changed manually after this engine template was assigned to engine assembly. If Unchecked, the sorting order matches with engine assembly
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If Checked, the sorting order does not match the LLP disk sheet of engine assembly. If Unchecked, the sorting order matches with the LLP disk sheet.
CustomField.label: Z_unused_2506 Override Sorting Order
